title: Team Configuration Schema
description: Validates team config files for goYoke team coordination workflows

team_name.description: Unique name for this team instance

workflow_type.description: Type of workflow this team executes

project_root.description: Absolute path to project root directory

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when team was created

budget_max_usd.description: Maximum budget for this team in USD

warning_threshold_usd.description: Budget threshold that triggers warnings in USD

status.description: Current status of the team workflow

background_pid.description: Process ID if running in background, null otherwise

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when execution started, null if not started

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when execution completed, null if not completed

waves.description: Sequential waves of parallel agent execution

description.description: Human-readable description of what this wave does

members.description: Agents executing in parallel within this wave

name.description: Unique name for this agent instance within the team

stdin_file.description: Filename for this agent's stdin JSON (relative to team dir)

stdout_file.description: Filename for this agent's stdout JSON (relative to team dir)

status.description: Current execution status of this agent

process_pid.description: Process ID when running, null otherwise

exit_code.description: Exit code after completion, null if not completed

cost_usd.description: Actual cost incurred by this agent in USD

error_message.description: Error message if agent failed, empty otherwise

retry_count.description: Number of retries attempted so far

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this agent started, null if not started

completed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this agent completed, null if not completed

on_complete_script.description: Optional script to run after this wave completes (e.g., goyoke-team-prepare-synthesis)
